name: aircfo-startup-finance
description: Unofficial Claude connectors and finance workflows for the startup back-office stack. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, Intuit, or Anthropic.

plugins.name: startup-finance
plugins.description: Bundles Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, and QuickBooks connectors with a finance-context builder skill that maps them into one finance profile, cross-tool skills (runway & burn, revenue reconciliation, board-metrics pack), and meta-skills to author and refine your own workflow skills.
